2026-04-27T08:40:01.3880798Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-27T08:40:01.3881431Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-27T08:40:01.3881925Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-27T08:40:01.3882340Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-27T08:40:01.3882684Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-27T08:40:01.3882949Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-27T08:40:01.3883124Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-04-27T08:40:01.3883321Z [36;1m[0m

2026-04-27T08:40:01.3883767Z [36;1m{[0m

2026-04-27T08:40:01.3884313Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-04-27T08:40:01.3884932Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m

emitter: @@clientName on listBySubscription operation not applied to MockableSubscriptionResource extension-method name\",\"body\":\"## Summary\\n\\nWhen a list operation is renamed via `@@clientName(...listBySubscription, \\u0026#34;\\u0026#34;getAll\\u0026#34;\\u0026#34;, \\u0026#34;\\u0026#34;csharp\\u0026#34;\\u0026#34;)` in client.tsp, the C# MPG emitter applies the rename to the inner `*CollectionResultOfT` helper class but **not** to the public extension-method name on `MockableSubscriptionResource` / `Extensions`.\\n\\n## Repro\\n\\nIn `specification/redis/resource-manager/Microsoft.Cache/Redis/client.tsp:227`:\\n\\n```tsp\\n@@clientName(RedisResources.listBySubscription, \\u0026#34;\\u0026#34;getAllRedis\\u0026#34;\\u0026#34;, \\u0026#34;\\u0026#34;csharp\\u0026#34;\\u0026#34;);\\n```\\n\\nAfter regen, the generated `MockableRedisSubscriptionResource.cs` contains:\\n\\n```csharp\\npublic virtual AsyncPageable GetRedisAsync(CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)\\n{\\n    // ...\\n    return new AsyncPageableWrapper(\\n        new RedisResourcesGetAllRedisAsyncCollectionResultOfT(...),  // \\u0026lt;-- renamed correctly\\n        ...);\\n}\\npublic virtual Pageable GetRedis(CancellationToken cancellationToken = default) // \\u0026lt;-- NOT renamed (expected GetAllRedis)\\n{ ... }\\n```\\n\\nThe same applies to `RedisExtensions.cs:233` (`GetRedisAsync` / `GetRedis` instead of `GetAllRedisAsync` / `GetAllRedis`).\\n\\n## Expected\\n\\nBoth the inner CollectionResult class **and** the public extension method should pick up the renamed identifier.\\n\\n## Workaround\\n\\n`[CodeGenSuppress(\\u0026#34;\\u0026#34;GetRedis\\u0026#34;\\u0026#34;, ...)] / [CodeGenSuppress(\\u0026#34;\\u0026#34;GetRedisAsync\\u0026#34;\\u0026#34;, ...)]` plus a hand-rolled re-implementation in `Customization/Extensions/MockableRedisSubscriptionResource.cs` and `Customization/Extensions/RedisExtensions.cs`.\\n\\nThe same workaround is in use across multiple SDKs (e.g. `Azure.ResourceManager.CognitiveServices`, `Azure.ResourceManager.FrontDoor`).\\n\\n## Context\\n\\nEncountered while migrating `Azure.ResourceManager.Redis` (PR #56877). Emitter version: `@azure-typespec/http-client-csharp-mgmt@1.0.0-alpha.20260423.3`.\",\"state\":\"open\",\"html_url\":\"https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/issues/58692\",\"user\":{\"login\":\"haiyuazhang\",\"id\":1924967,\"profile_url\":\"https://github.com/haiyuazhang\",\"avatar_url\":\"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/1924967?v=4\"},\"author_association\":\"MEMBER\",\"reactions\":{\"total_count\":1,\"+1\":0,\"-1\":0,\"laugh\":0,\"confused\":0,\"heart\":0,\"hooray\":0,\"rocket\":0,\"eyes\":1},\"created_at\":\"2026-04-27T08:38:36Z\",\"updated_at\":\"2026-04-27T08:38:36Z\"}","type":"text"}]}}}
2026-04-27T08:41:13.7205220Z {"timestamp":"2026-04-27T08:40:58.657247002Z","direction":"OUT","type":"REQUEST","server_id":"github","method":"tools/call","payload":{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"arguments":{"issue_number":58692,"method":"get","owner":"Azure","repo":"azure-sdk-for-net"},"name":"issue_read"}}}
2026-04-27T08:41:13.7215798Z {"timestamp":"2026-04-27T08:40:58.897039011Z","direction":"IN","type":"RESPONSE","server_id":"github","payload":{"id":1,"jsonrpc":"2.0","result":{"content":[{"text":"{\"number\":58692,\"title\":\"MPG emitter: @@clientName on listBySubscription operation not applied to MockableSubscriptionResource extension-method name\",\"body\":\"## Summary\\n\\nWhen a list operation is renamed via `@@clientName(...listBySubscription, \\u0026#34;\\u0026#34;getAll\\u0026#34;\\u0026#34;, \\u0026#34;\\u0026#34;csharp\\u0026#34;\\u0026#34;)` in client.tsp, the C# MPG emitter applies the rename to the inner `*CollectionResultOfT` helper class but **not** to the public extension-method name on `MockableSubscriptionResource` / `Extensions`.\\n\\n## Repro\\n\\nIn `specification/redis/resource-manager/Microsoft.Cache/Redis/client.tsp:227`:\\n\\n```tsp\\n@@clientName(RedisResources.listBySubscription, \\u0026#34;\\u0026#34;getAllRedis\\u0026#34;\\u0026#34;, \\u0026#34;\\u0026#34;csharp\\u0026#34;\\u0026#34;);\\n```\\n\\nAfter regen, the generated `MockableRedisSubscriptionResource.cs` contains:\\n\\n```csharp\\npublic virtual AsyncPageable GetRedisAsync(CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)\\n{\\n    // ...\\n    return new AsyncPageableWrapper(\\n        new RedisResourcesGetAllRedisAsyncCollectionResultOfT(...),  // \\u0026lt;-- renamed correctly\\n        ...);\\n}\\npublic virtual Pageable GetRedis(CancellationToken cancellationToken = default) // \\u0026lt;-- NOT renamed (expected GetAllRedis)\\n{ ... }\\n```\\n\\nThe same applies to `RedisExtensions.cs:233` (`GetRedisAsync` / `GetRedis` instead of `GetAllRedisAsync` / `GetAllRedis`).\\n\\n## Expected\\n\\nBoth the inner CollectionResult class **and** the public extension method should pick up the renamed identifier.\\n\\n## Workaround\\n\\n`[CodeGenSuppress(\\u0026#34;\\u0026#34;GetRedis\\u0026#34;\\u0026#34;, ...)] / [CodeGenSuppress(\\u0026#34;\\u0026#34;GetRedisAsync\\u0026#34;\\u0026#34;, ...)]` plus a hand-rolled re-implementation in `Customization/Extensions/MockableRedisSubscriptionResource.cs` and `Customization/Extensions/RedisExtensions.cs`.\\n\\nThe same workaround is in use across multiple SDKs (e.g. `Azure.ResourceManager.CognitiveServices`, `Azure.ResourceManager.FrontDoor`).\\n\\n## Context\\n\\nEncountered while migrating `Azure.ResourceManager.Redis` (PR #56877).
